findings: Monitor live counts derive primarily from filesystem counts (queue/claimed/results) and tmux pane census (live/done/dead), not PID files; PID staleness generally does not affect counts.
TOTAL_TASKS fallback counts JSON file paths across queue/claimed/results and uses sort -u on full paths; duplicated task files across dirs can overcount denominator and skew percent.
Per-agent status assumes fleet.json order maps to tmux pane_index; if panes reorder or tmux query fails, agent status can be misreported as dead/unknown.
Commander nested counts are taken from swarm-state.json telemetry fields with fallbacks; monitor does not cross-check against child-agents.jsonl.
